name: ice-cream-control-center
description: AI-powered Ice Cream Distribution Control Center

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production USE_MEMORY_DB=true node src/index.js
scripts.present: npm run build && cd server && npm run start:present
scripts.deploy:render: echo Push to GitHub then connect at https://dashboard.render.com/select-repo?type=blueprint
